projects.name: Knowlats.dev
projects.details: Personal knowledge base built with Astro, Svelte, TailwindCSS, and Markdown.

technologies.details: Next.js, React.js, Astro, Svelte.js, Truffle.js, Nest.js, TailwindCSS, Jest, Spring Boot
Git, Docker, RabbitMQ, Kafka, Firebase, Keycloak, ORY, Storybook, Ant Design
Vercel, CloudFlare, AWS S3, Web3, Ethereum (Blockchain)

details: Led 2 junior frontend developers to build a new corporate website (bitkubblockchain.com) with interactive public-facing product and brand pages.

Led frontend development with a junior developer to deliver an internal backoffice platform for Yangyuen (yangyuen.com), an ESG and health engagement platform, supporting workspace, event, challenge, and blockchain token management.

Collaborated with 2 frontend developers to build an internal back-office platform for Bitkub NFT marketplace (bitkubnft.com) and Creative Studio (studio.bitkubnft.com), supporting store, NFT, and gashapon management workflows.
Enhanced Creative Studio by integrating backend data via GraphQL and implementing blockchain interactions with Ethers.js.
Implemented authentication flows for Bitkub NEXT, currently rebranded as KUB Wallet (kubwallet.com), enabling secure access to token and collectible NFT management on KUB Chain.
Researched and experimented with ORY ecosystem (Kratos, Hydra) for authentication and authorization solutions.
Built and maintained Docker environments for application testing, ensuring service compatibility and deployment readiness before handoff to Infrastructure/DevOps teams.
Architected and built React and Next.js applications, establishing scalable UI patterns with Styled Components, Ant Design, and React Hook Form, and making UI documentation using Storybook.

Developed, and maintained 10+ microservices for MEA EV, an EV charging station reservation platform, using Java and Spring built with Apache Maven. Delivered core capabilities including PostgreSQL Database, Firebase notifications, Kafka-based stream processing, Keycloak authentication, and React-based login frontend integration.
Developed an authentication service based on protocol: OpenID Connect using Keycloak
Researched and introduced tools and technologies to development teams, such as OAuth 2.0, OpenID Connect (OIDC), Keycloak, Mockito (Java mock objects library)
Improved engineering practices by documenting APIs with Swagger and introducing tools such as Keycloak, OpenAPI to support team adoption and integration quality

Developed a proof-of-concept electricity market platform integrated with a blockchain network for usage tracking and token management using Nest.js and Web3.js, including PostgreSQL Database. I developed smart contracts using Solidity and deployed to private blockchain server using Truffle.js. Run unit testing with Mocha, and Chai.

Developed a backend service for a small digital certification website worked with a private blockchain network using JavaScript with frameworks: Express.js. I developed and deployed smart contracts running on private Ethereum servers using Solidity through Remix IDE (remix.ethereum.org)
Developed a small part of website using PHP with Laravel Framework, and MySQL Database for a client project.

educations.head: B.Sc. (Computer Science)
educations.details: King Mongkut's University of Technology North Bangkok, TH. 20014-2018 (GPA 3.56)

interests: Area: Creativity, Visualization, Drawing, Painting, Writing, Psychology, Fantasy Fictions
